Verse 4
Taya  nsaru zodetsedwa ndi chimo,
Kodi mwasamba m'mwazi Wace?
Kuli citseme cotsukira m'moyo
Usambe m'mwazi wa Yesuyo.

Verse 1
Ndi aleluya yimbirani Tate wathu
Wakumwamba, analenga zonse,
Cifundo cace cacikulu, nzeru, mpahmvu
Ndi Ufumu, tiyamike tonse.
Ndi aleluya yimbirani Yesu Kristu
Mpulumutsi, adacoka kwao,
Nakhala munthu pansi pano, nasauka,
Natifera, natis'ira mau.

Verse 2
Ndi aleluya yimbirani Mzimu wace
Wakuyera, amakhala nafe,
Atilangiza za Mulungu, nayeretsanso
Mitima ya aKristu ife.

Verse 3
Mulungu wathu tiyamika, 'Tate, Mwana
Mzimu yemwe, aleluya inu,
Woyera inu ndi mphamvu, muyenera
Anthu onse agwadire inu.

Verse 1
Yesu bwenzi la ocimwa,
Yesu wondikondabe,
Ena samandikwarina, 
Yesu salephera 'i.

Verse 2
Aleluya, Mpulumutsi! Aleluya, 
Bwenzilo!
Amakonda, amasunga; 
Ndimufuna Yesuyo.

Verse 3
Yesu ndiye mphamvu yanga,
Andilimbiktsatu;
Poyesedwa ndi adani,
Andipabanitsadi.

Verse 4
Yesu ndiye Mtsogoleri
Pakuyenda m'njiramo;
Ndipo ndikafuna kugwa
Andigwira dzanjalo.

Verse 5
Yesu ndimafuna inu,
Mwapambana zonsezo;
Mlamulire mtima wanga,
Mndikhalitse wanutu.
